title: Why the first crore feels slow, but the next comes faster – ‘8-4-3 rule’ of compounding explained
summary: Investing benefits from compounding over time, highlighted by the '8-4-3 rule' which shows how wealth accelerates. FundsIndia's report emphasizes patience, revealing that equities show true potential after seven years, with returns significantly outweighing contributions in the long run.

title: Missed a home loan EMI? Here are smart steps to avoid credit damage and manage loan repayment stress
summary: Missing a home loan EMI can hurt your credit score and weaken your financial stability. Timely communication with your lender, smart repayment planning and expert financial advice can help you manage the situation effectively.

title: I asked ChatGPT how to make my child a crorepati by age 18? AI suggests this investments roadmap and math behind it
summary: Parents can build a ₹1 crore corpus for their child by age 18 through early investments, averaging ₹8,000– ₹10,000 monthly via SIPs. Compounding plays a key role, and delaying investment increases monthly contributions significantly.

title: I asked ChatGPT which SIP date gives best returns? Here's what AI said based on historical data
summary: There is no single best SIP date for maximizing long-term returns; historical trends show negligible differences between dates. Staggered SIPs on the 1st, 15th, and 25th offer a balanced approach. Factors like increasing SIPs and maintaining asset allocation are more important for wealth creation.

title: Paytm Pocket Money to FamApp: 8 apps helping teenagers make digital payments without bank accounts
summary: Teen-focused fintech apps like Paytm Pocket Money and FamApp are helping young Indians make digital payments without bank accounts through prepaid cards, UPI access, parental controls and budgeting tools.

title: Gold, silver prices today: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold, 999 silver on 23 May in Delhi, Mumbai and Kolkata
summary: On 23 May, gold prices in India remained stable, with 24-karat gold priced at ₹159,320 per 10 grams. Silver prices also showed limited movement, with 999 Fine silver at ₹272,250 per kg. MCX trading is closed on weekends, limiting live updates.

title: Delhi’s new ration card rules changed: Fresh issuance begins after 13 years – Check new income limit, how to apply
summary: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta announced the resumption of issuing new ration cards from May 15 after 13 years. The government has cancelled 7.72 lakh invalid cards and is inviting fresh online applications, with eligibility limits for annual family income raised from ₹1 lakh to ₹1.20 lakh.

title: National Pension System: PFRDA clarifies NPS charge structure — what you need to know
summary: The PFRDA has clarified that NPS Tier-II accounts will incur annual maintenance charges (AMCs) similar to Tier-I accounts. The AMC for dormant accounts will be 10% and PRAN opening charge shall apply only at the time of initial PRAN generation.&nbsp;

title: Petrol, diesel price hiked third time in 10 days: Analysts warn of more hikes ahead— how high can rates go?
summary: Petrol and diesel prices rose by up to 91 paise per litre, marking the third increase in less than 10 days. Analysts predict further hikes may be necessary as oil companies face significant losses due to elevated crude prices stemming from the West Asia conflict.

title: Bank holiday today: Are SBI, HDFC Bank, and other banks closed on Saturday, May 23?
summary: All banks in India are closed on May 23, 2026, due to the scheduled bank holiday on the fourth Saturday. This closure is part of the RBI's holiday schedule, with banks also closed on specific Sundays and local holidays varying by state.

title: UK's FTSE 100 snaps four-week losing streak as rate hike fears ease
summary: UK's FTSE 100 index is poised to end a losing streak, buoyed by softer inflation and rising unemployment data that eases pressure for a Bank of England rate hike. Retail sales saw their steepest fall in nearly a year, adding to concerns about consumer spending amid global and domestic challenges.
